zh.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel是Gerardus Lepel和N.N Von Schwerin的兒子，出生。他和N.N Von Cartlow至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel是Gerardus Lepel和N.N Von Schwerin的儿子，出生。他和N.N Von Cartlow至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Lepel
meanings: A male name. Perhaps corrupted from Leopold. Lepel is, however, the name of two towns (New and Old) of Russian Poland, gov. Vitebsk.

nameMeanings.name: Zabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel was born as the son of Gerardus Lepel and N.N Von Schwerin. He had at least 1 son with N.N Von Cartlow.

fr.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel est né, fils de Gerardus Lepel et N.N Von Schwerin. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec N.N Von Cartlow.

de.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel wurde, als Sohn von Gerardus Lepel und N.N Von Schwerin geboren. Er hatte mit N.N Von Cartlow mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel è nato il come figlio di Gerardus Lepel e N.N Von Schwerin. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con N.N Von Cartlow.

ja.lifeSummary: Zabel LepelはGerardus LepelとN.N Von Schwerinの息子として生まれた。彼はN.N Von Cartlowとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel(은)는 Gerardus Lepel(와)과 N.N Von Schwerin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 N.N Von Cartlow(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel nasceu filho de Gerardus Lepel e N.N Von Schwerin. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com N.N Von Cartlow.

ru.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel родился. Его родителей звали Gerardus Lepel и N.N Von Schwerin. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от N.N Von Cartlow.

es.lifeSummary: Zabel Lepel nació como hijo de Gerardus Lepel y N.N Von Schwerin. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con N.N Von Cartlow.
